name:
FEAST: The EXALTATION (SEP 14)
 OF THE HOLY CROSS [ABC]

readings.summary: The Israelites are delivered from the fiery serpents.

readings.citation:
Ps 78:1bc-2, 34-35, 36-37, 38
Do not forget the works of the Lord!
readings.antiphon:
Ps 78:1bc-2, 34-35, 36-37, 38
Do not forget the works of the Lord!

readings.summary:
We adore you, O Christ, and we bless you,
because by your Cross you have redeemed the world.
The Son of Man must be lifted up to gain eternal life.

antiphons.text:
We should glory in the Cross of our Lord Jesus Christ,
in whom is our salvation, life and resurrection,
through whom we are saved and delivered.

When I am lifted up from the earth,
I will draw everyone to myself, says the Lord.

planningNotes: Theme -"Always be ready to give an explanation..
for a reason for your hope," (1 Peter 3:15).
